name: Elisira Maren Lagrange
description: Second-in-command. Hacker and veilrunner who operates from the shadows with dual pistols.

relic_weapon.inlay_effect: Sensor spoofing; disrupts enemy targeting systems

ability_slots.name: Veil Stitch
ability_slots.description: Disrupt target sensors. Blinds enemy for 2 turns, reducing accuracy.

ability_slots.name: Precision Shot
ability_slots.description: Carefully aimed shot dealing high single-target physical damage.

ability_slots.name: Ghost Walk
ability_slots.description: Enter full stealth for 2 turns. Cannot be targeted by enemies.

ability_slots.name: Data Breach
ability_slots.description: Hack enemy systems. Reveals target stats, abilities, and weaknesses.

ability_slots.name: Quick Draw
ability_slots.description: Interrupt shot fired before an enemy completes their action.

ability_slots.name: Shadow Network
ability_slots.description: Extends veil across the party. All allies gain stealth for 1 turn.
